title: Lead List
description: Track, evaluate and assign admission leads through the current admin workflow.
notFoundHint: Try changing search keywords or current filters.
searchPlaceholder: Search by lead name, email, phone...
resultsUpdateHint: Results update 1 second after you stop typing
updateError: Unable to update lead right now. Please try again later.
detailDescription: Review profile, status, interested majors and applications of this lead.
invalidExtracurricularJson: Extracurricular activities must be valid JSON before saving.
leadProfileDescription: Update profile information and scoring indices for this lead.
statusSaveNote: Status will be saved along with other lead information.
noApplications: No applications linked to this lead.
activitiesDescription: View interaction history and score changes for this lead.
noActivitiesHint: Score changes and lead interactions will appear here.
scoreHistoryDescription: Track score fluctuations based on recorded activities.
scoreTrendDescription: Calculated from score changes in chronological order.
noScoreHistoryHint: Score changes will appear after lead activities are recorded.
